From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Japanese thoroughbred horse racing award

The **JRA Award for Best Three-Year-Old Colt** is a title awarded annually by the [Japan Racing Association](/wiki/Japan_Racing_Association "Japan Racing Association") (JRA).
Since 1987 the honor has been part of the [JRA Awards](/wiki/JRA_Award "JRA Award").

## Winners

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=JRA_Award_for_Best_Three-Year-Old_Colt&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Winners")]

| 1989 | Winner's Circle | Yasuhisa Matsuyama | Hiroshi Kuriyama |
| 1990 | [Ines Fujin](/wiki/Ines_Fujin "Ines Fujin") | Shuho Kato | Masaaki Kobayashi |

| 2000 | [Air Shakur](/wiki/Air_Shakur "Air Shakur") | Hideyuki Mori | Lucky Field Co |
| 2001 | [Jungle Pocket](/wiki/Jungle_Pocket "Jungle Pocket") | Sakae Watanabe | Yomoji Saitō |
| 2002 | [Symboli Kris S](/wiki/Symboli_Kris_S "Symboli Kris S") | [Kazuo Fujisawa](/wiki/Kazuo_Fujisawa "Kazuo Fujisawa") | Symboli Stud |
| 2003 | [Neo Universe](/wiki/Neo_Universe "Neo Universe") | Tsutomu Setoguchi | Shadai Racing |
| 2004 | [King Kamehameha](/wiki/King_Kamehameha_(horse) "King Kamehameha (horse)") | Kunihide Matsuda | [Makoto Kaneko](/wiki/Makoto_Kaneko_(businessman) "Makoto Kaneko (businessman)") |
| 2005 | [Deep Impact](/wiki/Deep_Impact_(horse) "Deep Impact (horse)") | Yasuo Ikee | Makoto Kaneko |
| 2006 | [Meisho Samson](/wiki/Meisho_Samson "Meisho Samson") | Tsutomu Setoguchi | Yoshio Matsumoto |
| 2007 | Asakusa Kings | Ryuji Okubo | Kunio Tahara |
| 2008 | [Deep Sky](/wiki/Deep_Sky_(horse) "Deep Sky (horse)") | Mitsugu Kon | Toshio Fukami |
| 2009 | [Logi Universe](/wiki/Logi_Universe "Logi Universe") | Kiyoshi Hagawara | Masaaki Kumeta |
| 2010 | [Victoire Pisa](/wiki/Victoire_Pisa "Victoire Pisa") | [Katsuhiko Sumii](/wiki/Katsuhiko_Sumii "Katsuhiko Sumii") | Yoshimi Ichikawa |
| 2011 | [Orfevre](/wiki/Orfevre "Orfevre") | Yasutoshi Ikee | Sunday Racing |
| 2012 | [Gold Ship](/wiki/Gold_Ship "Gold Ship") | [Naosuke Sugai](/wiki/Naosuke_Sugai "Naosuke Sugai") | Eiichi Kobayashi |
| 2013 | [Kizuna](/wiki/Kizuna_(horse) "Kizuna (horse)") | Shozo Sasaki | Shinji Maeda |
| 2014 | [Isla Bonita](/wiki/Isla_Bonita "Isla Bonita") | Hironori Kurita | Shadai Racing |
| 2015 | [Duramente](/wiki/Duramente "Duramente") | [Noriyuki Hori](/wiki/Noriyuki_Hori "Noriyuki Hori") | Sunday Racing Co Ltd |
| 2016 | [Satono Diamond](/wiki/Satono_Diamond "Satono Diamond") | Yasutoshi Ikee | Hajime Satomi |
| 2017 | [Rey de Oro](/wiki/Rey_de_Oro "Rey de Oro") | [Kazuo Fujisawa](/wiki/Kazuo_Fujisawa "Kazuo Fujisawa") | U Carrot Farm[[1]](#cite_note-1) |
| 2018 | [Blast Onepiece](/wiki/Blast_Onepiece "Blast Onepiece") | Masahiro Otake | Silk Racing Co Ltd |
| 2019 | [Saturnalia](/wiki/Saturnalia_(horse) "Saturnalia (horse)") | Katsuhiko Sumii | Carrot Farm[[2]](#cite_note-2) |

| 2024 | [Danon Decile](/wiki/Danon_Decile "Danon Decile") | Shogo Yasuda | Danox Co. Ltd.[[7]](#cite_note-7) |
| 2025 | [Museum Mile](/wiki/Museum_Mile_(horse) "Museum Mile (horse)") | Daisuke Takayanagi | Sunday Racing Co Ltd[[8]](#cite_note-8) |
